  function createDemoSnapshots(finalValue) {
    const snapshots = [];
    const days = 92;
    const startMs = Date.UTC(2025, 11, 5, 6, 0, 0);
    let value = finalValue * 0.88;

    for (let index = 0; index < days; index += 1) {
      const drift = finalValue * 0.00075;
      const seasonal = Math.sin(index / 5) * 950 + Math.cos(index / 11) * 620;
      const shock =
        index === 19 ? -4200 :
        index === 43 ? -6100 :
        index === 68 ? 3200 :
        index === 79 ? -2800 :
        0;

      value = Math.max(finalValue * 0.8, value + drift + seasonal + shock);

      if (index === days - 1) {
        value = finalValue;
      }

      snapshots.push({
        date: new Date(startMs + index * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(),
        value: Number(value.toFixed(2)),
      });
    }

    snapshots.push({
      date: "2026-03-06T14:10:00.000Z",
      value: Number(finalValue.toFixed(2)),
    });

    return snapshots;
  }

  function applyModeChrome() {
    const signOutButton = document.getElementById("sign-out-btn");
    const clearDataButton = document.getElementById("clear-data-btn");
    const refreshPricesButton = document.getElementById("refresh-prices-btn");
    const settingsLink = document.getElementById("nav-settings-link");

    if (state.demoMode) {
      setText("nav-user-email", "Demo workspace");
      setText("meta-account-name", DEMO_SESSION_USER.displayName);
      setClass("meta-plan-chip", "plan-chip pro");
      setText("meta-plan-chip", "Pro Demo");
      setText("pro-console-badge", "Pro Demo");
      if (signOutButton) {
        signOutButton.textContent = "Create Account";
        signOutButton.setAttribute("href", "/classic#access");
      }
      if (clearDataButton) {
        clearDataButton.textContent = "Reset Demo";
      }
      if (refreshPricesButton) {
        refreshPricesButton.textContent = "Exit Demo";
      }
      if (settingsLink) {
        settingsLink.setAttribute("href", "/spectre-settings-v3.html?demo=1");
      }
      uploads.forEach((card) => {
        card.style.opacity = "0.72";
        card.setAttribute("aria-disabled", "true");
        const action = card.querySelector(".upload-action");
        if (action) action.textContent = "Create Account to Upload";
      });
      return;
    }

    if (signOutButton) {
      signOutButton.textContent = "Sign Out";
      signOutButton.setAttribute("href", "#");
    }
    if (clearDataButton) {
      clearDataButton.textContent = "Clear Data";
    }
    if (refreshPricesButton) {
      refreshPricesButton.textContent = "Refresh Prices";
    }
    if (settingsLink) {
      settingsLink.setAttribute("href", "/spectre-settings-v3.html");
    }
    uploads.forEach((card) => {
      card.style.opacity = "";
      card.removeAttribute("aria-disabled");
      const action = card.querySelector(".upload-action");
      if (action) action.textContent = "Upload File";
    });
  }

  function applyPlanVisibility() {
    const hasProAccess = Boolean(state.demoMode || state.sessionUser?.proEnabled);
    const navAlertsLink = document.getElementById("nav-alerts-link");
    const alertsSection = document.getElementById("alerts");
    const stressPanel = document.getElementById("stress-panel");
    const metricsPanelSplit = document.querySelector("#metrics .panel-split");
    const riskWindowTabs = document.getElementById("risk-window-tabs");
    const riskGrid = document.querySelector(".risk-grid");
    const proRiskCards = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".pro-risk"));

    if (navAlertsLink) navAlertsLink.style.display = hasProAccess ? "" : "none";
    if (alertsSection) alertsSection.style.display = hasProAccess ? "" : "none";
    if (stressPanel) stressPanel.style.display = hasProAccess ? "" : "none";
    if (metricsPanelSplit) metricsPanelSplit.classList.toggle("starter-layout", !hasProAccess);
    if (riskWindowTabs) riskWindowTabs.style.display = hasProAccess ? "" : "none";
    if (riskGrid) riskGrid.classList.toggle("starter-layout", !hasProAccess);
    proRiskCards.forEach((card) => {
      card.style.display = hasProAccess ? "" : "none";
    });
  }

  function detectBullionMetal(holding) {
    const text = `${holding.name || ""} ${holding.ticker || ""} ${holding.sector || ""}`.toLowerCase();
    if (text.includes("silver") || /(^|\\W)ag(\\W|$)/.test(text)) {
      return "silver";
    }
    return "gold";
  }

  function formatCurrency(value, opts = {}) {
    if (!Number.isFinite(value)) return "—";
    return new Intl.NumberFormat("en-AU", {
      style: "currency",
      currency: "AUD",
      minimumFractionDigits: opts.decimals ?? 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: opts.decimals ?? 0,
      notation: opts.compact ? "compact" : "standard",
      compactDisplay: opts.compact ? "short" : undefined,
    }).format(value);
  }

  function formatSignedCurrency(value, opts = {}) {
    if (!Number.isFinite(value)) return "—";
    if (value === 0) return formatCurrency(0, opts);
    const sign = value > 0 ? "+" : "−";
    return `${sign}${formatCurrency(Math.abs(value), opts)}`;
  }

  function formatPercent(value, opts = {}) {
    if (!Number.isFinite(value)) return "—";
    const absValue = Math.abs(value);
    const rendered = `${absValue.toFixed(opts.decimals ?? 1)}%`;
    if (opts.signed) {
      return `${value >= 0 ? "+" : "−"}${rendered}`;
    }
    return opts.negative ? `−${rendered}` : rendered;
  }

  function toSydneyDateKey(value) {
    const date = value instanceof Date ? value : new Date(value);
    if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return "";
    const parts = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-AU", {
      timeZone: "Australia/Sydney",
      year: "numeric",
      month: "2-digit",
      day: "2-digit",
    }).formatToParts(date);
    const year = parts.find((part) => part.type === "year")?.value;
    const month = parts.find((part) => part.type === "month")?.value;
    const day = parts.find((part) => part.type === "day")?.value;
    if (!year || !month || !day) return "";
    return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
  }

  function formatSignedCompact(value, opts = {}) {
    if (!Number.isFinite(value)) return "—";
    if (value === 0) return "0";
    const rendered = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-AU", {
      notation: "compact",
      compactDisplay: "short",
      minimumFractionDigits: opts.decimals ?? 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: opts.decimals ?? 1,
    }).format(Math.abs(value));
    return `${value > 0 ? "+" : "−"}${rendered}`;
  }

  function toDate(value) {
    const parsed = new Date(value);
    return Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime()) ? null : parsed;
  }

  function applyRiskWindow(history, riskWindow) {
    if (riskWindow === "ALL" || history.length === 0) return history;
    const latest = toDate(history[history.length - 1].date);
    if (!latest) return history;
    const cutoff = new Date(latest.getTime());
    const days = RISK_WINDOW_DAYS[riskWindow] || RISK_WINDOW_DAYS["3M"];
    cutoff.setUTCDate(cutoff.getUTCDate() - (days - 1));
    return history.filter((item) => {
      const d = toDate(item.date);
      return d && d.getTime() >= cutoff.getTime();
    });
  }

  function calculateReturns(values) {
    const returns = [];
    for (let i = 1; i < values.length; i += 1) {
      const prev = values[i - 1];
      const current = values[i];
      if (prev > 0 && Number.isFinite(prev) && Number.isFinite(current)) {
        returns.push(current / prev - 1);
      }
    }
    return returns;
  }

  function percentile(values, p) {
    const sorted = [...values].sort((a, b) => a - b);
    const index = (sorted.length - 1) * p;
    const lower = Math.floor(index);
    const upper = Math.ceil(index);
    if (lower === upper) return sorted[lower];
    const weight = index - lower;
    return sorted[lower] * (1 - weight) + sorted[upper] * weight;
  }

  function winsorize(values, lowerP, upperP) {
    const lower = percentile(values, lowerP);
    const upper = percentile(values, upperP);
    return values.map((value) => (value < lower ? lower : value > upper ? upper : value));
  }

  function cleanReturnsForRisk(returns) {
    const finiteReturns = returns.filter(Number.isFinite);
    if (finiteReturns.length <= 2) return finiteReturns;
    const withoutSpikes = finiteReturns.filter((value) => Math.abs(value) <= 0.4);
    if (withoutSpikes.length <= 2) return withoutSpikes;
    if (withoutSpikes.length >= 30) return winsorize(withoutSpikes, 0.01, 0.99);
    return withoutSpikes;
  }

  function stdDev(values) {
    if (values.length < 2) return 0;
    const mean = sum(values) / values.length;
    const variance = sum(values.map((value) => (value - mean) ** 2)) / (values.length - 1);
    return Math.sqrt(variance);
  }

  function calcMaxDrawdown(values) {
    let peak = values[0];
    let maxDrawdown = 0;
    for (const value of values) {
      if (value > peak) peak = value;
      const drawdown = peak > 0 ? (peak - value) / peak : 0;
      if (drawdown > maxDrawdown) maxDrawdown = drawdown;
    }
    return maxDrawdown;
  }

  function expectedShortfall95(returns) {
    if (returns.length < 20) return null;
    const cutoff = percentile(returns, 0.05);
    const tail = returns.filter((value) => value <= cutoff);
    if (tail.length === 0) return null;
    return sum(tail) / tail.length;
  }

  function computeRsi(values, period = 14) {
    const closes = values.filter(Number.isFinite);
    if (closes.length <= period) return null;
    const start = Math.max(1, closes.length - period);
    let gains = 0;
    let losses = 0;
    for (let i = start; i < closes.length; i += 1) {
      const change = closes[i] - closes[i - 1];
      if (change > 0) gains += change;
      if (change < 0) losses += Math.abs(change);
    }
    const avgGain = gains / period;
    const avgLoss = losses / period;
    if (avgLoss === 0 && avgGain === 0) return 50;
    if (avgLoss === 0) return 100;
    const rs = avgGain / avgLoss;
    return 100 - (100 / (1 + rs));
  }

  function computeStochastic(values, period = 14) {
    const closes = values.filter(Number.isFinite);
    if (closes.length < period) return null;
    const window = closes.slice(-period);
    const lowest = Math.min(...window);
    const highest = Math.max(...window);
    const current = closes[closes.length - 1];
    if (!Number.isFinite(lowest) || !Number.isFinite(highest) || !Number.isFinite(current)) return null;
    if (highest === lowest) return 50;
    return clamp(((current - lowest) / (highest - lowest)) * 100, 0, 100);
  }

  function computeObvProxy(values) {
    const closes = values.filter(Number.isFinite);
    if (closes.length < 2) {
      return { value: null, trend: "Needs more history" };
    }
    let obv = 0;
    const series = [0];
    for (let i = 1; i < closes.length; i += 1) {
      const prev = closes[i - 1];
      const current = closes[i];
      const flowMagnitude = Math.abs(current - prev);
      if (current > prev) obv += flowMagnitude;
      if (current < prev) obv -= flowMagnitude;
      series.push(obv);
    }
    const lookback = Math.min(5, series.length - 1);
    const trendDelta = lookback > 0 ? series[series.length - 1] - series[series.length - 1 - lookback] : 0;
    const trend = trendDelta > 0 ? "Rising buying pressure" : trendDelta < 0 ? "Falling buying pressure" : "Flat flow";
    return { value: obv, trend };
  }

  function resolveHoldingUnits(units, value, price) {
    if (Number.isFinite(units) && units > 0) return units;
    if (Number.isFinite(value) && Number.isFinite(price) && value > 0 && price > 0) return value / price;
    return 0;
  }

  function computeMetrics(holdings, snapshots, riskWindow) {
    const totalValue = sum(holdings.map((item) => Number(item.value) || 0));
    const totalCost = sum(holdings.map((item) => Number(item.costBase) || 0));
    const pnl = totalValue - totalCost;
    const pnlPct = totalCost > 0 ? (pnl / totalCost) * 100 : 0;
    const sortedHoldings = [...holdings].sort((a, b) => (b.value || 0) - (a.value || 0));
    const topHoldings = sortedHoldings.slice(0, 8).map((holding) => ({
      ...holding,
      weightPct: totalValue > 0 ? ((holding.value || 0) / totalValue) * 100 : 0,
      pnl: (holding.value || 0) - (holding.costBase || 0),
    }));

    const concentrationValues = holdings
      .map((item) => {
        const value = Number(item.value) || 0;
        const riskSource = resolveRiskSource(item);
        const multiplier = SOURCE_CONCENTRATION_MULTIPLIER[riskSource] ?? 1;
        return value * multiplier;
      })
      .sort((a, b) => b - a);
    const top3ConcentrationPct = totalValue > 0 ? (sum(concentrationValues.slice(0, 3)) / totalValue) * 100 : 0;
    const hhi = totalValue > 0
      ? sum(concentrationValues.map((value) => {
        const weight = value / totalValue;
        return weight * weight;
      })) * 10000
      : 0;
    const accountAllocation = buildAllocation(holdings, "account", totalValue);
    const sectorAllocation = buildAllocation(holdings, "sector", totalValue);
    const largestAccountPct = accountAllocation.length > 0 ? accountAllocation[0].pct : 0;
    const sourceRiskLoad = totalValue > 0
      ? holdings.reduce((acc, item) => {
        const value = Number(item.value) || 0;
        const riskSource = resolveRiskSource(item);
        const multiplier = SOURCE_RISK_MULTIPLIER[riskSource] ?? 1;
        return acc + value * multiplier;
      }, 0) / totalValue
      : 0;
    const diversifiedIndexFundPct = totalValue > 0
      ? (holdings.reduce((acc, item) => {
        const value = Number(item.value) || 0;
        const riskSource = resolveRiskSource(item);
        return riskSource === "index" || riskSource === "fund" ? acc + value : acc;
      }, 0) / totalValue) * 100
      : 0;

    const latestSnapshotByDay = new Map();
    for (const item of snapshots || []) {
      if (!Number.isFinite(item.value) || item.value <= 0) continue;
      const dayKey = String(item.date || "").slice(0, 10);
      const existing = latestSnapshotByDay.get(dayKey);
      if (!existing || item.date > existing.date) {
        latestSnapshotByDay.set(dayKey, { date: item.date, value: item.value });
      }
    }

    const history = Array.from(latestSnapshotByDay.values()).sort((a, b) => String(a.date).localeCompare(String(b.date)));
    const riskHistory = applyRiskWindow(history, riskWindow);
    const rawDailyReturns = calculateReturns(riskHistory.map((item) => item.value));
    const dailyReturns = cleanReturnsForRisk(rawDailyReturns);
    const returnOutliersRemoved = Math.max(0, rawDailyReturns.length - dailyReturns.length);
    const volatilityAnnualPct = dailyReturns.length >= 2 ? stdDev(dailyReturns) * Math.sqrt(252) * 100 : null;
    const maxDrawdownPct = riskHistory.length >= 2 ? calcMaxDrawdown(riskHistory.map((item) => item.value)) * 100 : null;
    const var95Raw = dailyReturns.length >= 20 ? percentile(dailyReturns, 0.05) : null;
    const var95Pct = var95Raw != null ? Math.max(0, -var95Raw * 100) : null;
    const cvar95Raw = dailyReturns.length >= 20 ? expectedShortfall95(dailyReturns) : null;
    const cvar95Pct = cvar95Raw != null ? Math.max(0, -cvar95Raw * 100) : null;
    const riskValues = riskHistory.map((item) => Number(item.value)).filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value) && value > 0);
    const rsi14 = computeRsi(riskValues, 14);
    const stochastic14 = computeStochastic(riskValues, 14);
    const obv = computeObvProxy(riskValues);

    return {
      totalValue,
      totalCost,
      pnl,
      pnlPct,
      top3ConcentrationPct,
      hhi,
      largestAccountPct,
      sourceRiskLoad,
      diversifiedIndexFundPct,
      topHoldings,
      accountAllocation,
      sectorAllocation,
      history,
      riskHistory,
      dailyReturns,
      rawDailyReturnsCount: rawDailyReturns.length,
      returnOutliersRemoved,
      volatilityAnnualPct,
      maxDrawdownPct,
      var95Pct,
      cvar95Pct,
      rsi14,
      stochastic14,
      obvValue: obv.value,
      obvTrend: obv.trend,
      riskPointsUsed: riskHistory.length,
      riskStartDate: riskHistory.length > 0 ? riskHistory[0].date : null,
      riskEndDate: riskHistory.length > 0 ? riskHistory[riskHistory.length - 1].date : null,
    };
  }

  function buildAllocation(holdings, key, totalValue) {
    const grouped = new Map();
    for (const item of holdings) {
      const k = item[key] || "Uncategorized";
      grouped.set(k, (grouped.get(k) || 0) + (item.value || 0));
    }
    return Array.from(grouped.entries())
      .map(([name, value]) => ({ name, value, pct: totalValue > 0 ? (value / totalValue) * 100 : 0 }))
      .sort((a, b) => b.value - a.value);
  }

  function computeTodayChange(holdings, snapshots) {
    const todayKeySydney = toSydneyDateKey(new Date());
    const preExistingHoldings = (holdings || []).filter((holding) => {
      const importedAt = new Date(holding?.importedAt || "");
      if (Number.isNaN(importedAt.getTime())) {
        return true;
      }
      return toSydneyDateKey(importedAt) < todayKeySydney;
    });
    const hasSameDayImports = preExistingHoldings.length < (holdings || []).length;
    const currentTotal = sum(preExistingHoldings.map((holding) => Number(holding.value) || 0));
    let fallbackPreviousTotal = 0;
    let fallbackCurrentTotal = 0;

    for (const holding of preExistingHoldings) {
      const quantity = resolveHoldingUnits(Number(holding?.units), Number(holding?.value), Number(holding?.price));
      const price = Number(holding?.price);
      const prevClose = Number(holding?.prevClose);

      if (!Number.isFinite(quantity) || quantity <= 0 || !Number.isFinite(price) || !Number.isFinite(prevClose) || price <= 0 || prevClose <= 0) {
        const value = Number(holding?.value);
        if (Number.isFinite(value) && value > 0) {
          fallbackPreviousTotal += value;
          fallbackCurrentTotal += value;
        }
        continue;
      }

      fallbackPreviousTotal += quantity * prevClose;
      fallbackCurrentTotal += quantity * price;
    }

    const todaySnapshots = (snapshots || [])
      .filter((snapshot) => Number.isFinite(snapshot?.value) && toSydneyDateKey(snapshot?.date) === todayKeySydney)
      .sort((a, b) => String(a.date || "").localeCompare(String(b.date || "")));

    if (hasSameDayImports || todaySnapshots.length === 0) {
      if (fallbackPreviousTotal > 0) {
        const amount = fallbackCurrentTotal - fallbackPreviousTotal;
        return { amount, pct: (amount / fallbackPreviousTotal) * 100 };
      }
      return { amount: 0, pct: 0 };
    }

    const dayStartValue = Number(todaySnapshots[0].value) || 0;
    if (dayStartValue <= 0 && fallbackPreviousTotal > 0) {
      const amount = fallbackCurrentTotal - fallbackPreviousTotal;
      return { amount, pct: (amount / fallbackPreviousTotal) * 100 };
    }

    const change = currentTotal - dayStartValue;
    return {
      amount: change,
      pct: dayStartValue > 0 ? (change / dayStartValue) * 100 : 0,
    };
  }

  function countKeywordHits(corpus, keywords) {
    return keywords.reduce((total, keyword) => total + (corpus.includes(keyword) ? 1 : 0), 0);
  }

  function buildHoldingsAiSignalCorpus(analysis) {
    if (!analysis || typeof analysis !== "object") return "";
    const segments = new Set();
    const addSegment = (value) => {
      const normalized = String(value || "").trim().toLowerCase();
      if (normalized) segments.add(normalized);
    };

    addSegment(analysis.answer);
    (analysis.portfolioDrivers || []).forEach(addSegment);
    (analysis.riskChecks || []).forEach(addSegment);
    (analysis.nextActions || []).forEach(addSegment);
    (analysis.holdingBreakdown || []).forEach((item) => {
      if (!item || typeof item !== "object") return;
      addSegment(item.summary);
      (item.influences || []).forEach(addSegment);
      (item.riskFlags || []).forEach(addSegment);
    });

    return Array.from(segments).join(" | ");
  }

  function computeAiRiskAdjustment(holdingsAi) {
    const corpus = buildHoldingsAiSignalCorpus(holdingsAi);
    if (!corpus) return 0;

    const negativeHits = countKeywordHits(corpus, AI_RISK_NEGATIVE_KEYWORDS);
    const positiveHits = countKeywordHits(corpus, AI_RISK_POSITIVE_KEYWORDS);
    const confidenceSamples = (holdingsAi?.holdingBreakdown || [])
      .map((item) => Number(item?.confidence))
      .filter(Number.isFinite);
    const averageConfidence = confidenceSamples.length > 0
      ? confidenceSamples.reduce((total, value) => total + value, 0) / confidenceSamples.length
      : 60;
    const confidenceWeight = clamp(averageConfidence / 100, 0.4, 1);
    const weightedDelta = (positiveHits - negativeHits) * confidenceWeight;
    return Math.round(clamp(weightedDelta, -5, 5));
  }

  function computeRiskScore(metrics, riskReturnsUsed, holdingsAi, proEnabled) {
    if (metrics.totalValue <= 0) return null;
    const volatilityPenalty = normalizePenalty(metrics.volatilityAnnualPct, 8, 30) * 30;
    const varPenalty = normalizePenalty(metrics.var95Pct, 0.7, 3.2) * 22;
    const drawdownPenalty = normalizePenalty(metrics.maxDrawdownPct, 6, 25) * 20;
    const diversifiedSleeveRelief = clamp((Number(metrics.diversifiedIndexFundPct) || 0) / 100, 0, 1);
    const concentrationWeight = 16 * (1 - 0.55 * diversifiedSleeveRelief);
    const accountWeight = 12 * (1 - 0.45 * diversifiedSleeveRelief);
    const concentrationPenalty = normalizePenalty(metrics.top3ConcentrationPct, 30, 75) * concentrationWeight;
    const accountPenalty = normalizePenalty(metrics.largestAccountPct, 45, 85) * accountWeight;
    const sourceMixPenalty = normalizePenalty(metrics.sourceRiskLoad, 0.55, 1.35) * 10;
    const confidencePenalty = (1 - clamp(riskReturnsUsed / 63, 0, 1)) * 12;
    const totalPenalty = volatilityPenalty + varPenalty + drawdownPenalty + concentrationPenalty + accountPenalty + sourceMixPenalty + confidencePenalty;
    const baseScore = Math.round(clamp(100 - totalPenalty, 1, 99));
    const aiAdjustment = proEnabled ? computeAiRiskAdjustment(holdingsAi) : 0;
    const score = Math.round(clamp(baseScore + aiAdjustment, 1, 99));
    const label = score >= 75 ? "Controlled" : score >= 55 ? "Moderate" : "Elevated";
    return { score, label, aiAdjustment };
  }

  function dpr(canvas) {
    const r = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    const fallbackWidth = canvas.parentElement?.clientWidth || canvas.clientWidth || 0;
    const fallbackHeight =
      Number(canvas.getAttribute("height")) ||
      canvas.parentElement?.clientHeight ||
      canvas.clientHeight ||
      200;
    const w = Math.max(1, Math.round(rect.width || fallbackWidth));
    const h = Math.max(1, Math.round(rect.height || fallbackHeight));
    canvas.style.height = `${h}px`;
    canvas.width = Math.round(w * r);
    canvas.height = Math.round(h * r);
    const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
    if (!ctx) return null;
    ctx.setTransform(r, 0, 0, r, 0, 0);
    return { ctx, w, h };
  }

  function drawRoundedRect(ctx, x, y, width, height, radius) {
    if (typeof ctx.roundRect === "function") {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.roundRect(x, y, width, height, radius);
      return;
    }

    const [tl, tr, br, bl] = Array.isArray(radius) ? radius : [radius, radius, radius, radius];
    const right = x + width;
    const bottom = y + height;

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x + tl, y);
    ctx.lineTo(right - tr, y);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(right, y, right, y + tr);
    ctx.lineTo(right, bottom - br);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(right, bottom, right - br, bottom);
    ctx.lineTo(x + bl, bottom);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, bottom, x, bottom - bl);
    ctx.lineTo(x, y + tl);
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + tl, y);
  }

  function drawDonut(id, data) {
    const canvas = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!canvas) return;
    const sized = dpr(canvas);
    if (!sized) return;
    const { ctx, w, h } = sized;
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);
    const cx = w / 2;
    const cy = h / 2;
    const R = Math.min(w, h) * 0.38;
    const r = R * 0.58;
    let angle = -Math.PI / 2;
    data.forEach((d) => {
      const sweep = (d.pct / 100) * Math.PI * 2;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(cx, cy);
      ctx.arc(cx, cy, R, angle, angle + sweep);
      ctx.closePath();
      ctx.fillStyle = d.color;
      ctx.fill();
      angle += sweep;
    });
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx, cy, r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(10,7,18,.97)";
    ctx.fill();
    angle = -Math.PI / 2;
    data.forEach((d) => {
      const sweep = (d.pct / 100) * Math.PI * 2;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(cx, cy);
      ctx.arc(cx, cy, R + 2, angle - 0.012, angle + 0.012);
      ctx.closePath();
      ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(10,7,18,1)";
      ctx.fill();
      angle += sweep;
    });
  }

  function drawHoldingsBars(data) {
    const canvas = document.getElementById("c-holdings");
    if (!canvas) return;
    const sized = dpr(canvas);
    if (!sized) return;
    const { ctx, w, h } = sized;
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);
    const safeData = data.length > 0 ? data : [{ label: "—", val: 1 }];
    const pad = { t: 14, r: 10, b: 32, l: 10 };
    const cw = w - pad.l - pad.r;
    const ch = h - pad.t - pad.b;
    const bw = cw / safeData.length;
    const max = Math.max(...safeData.map((item) => item.val), 1);

    ctx.strokeStyle = M;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    [0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1].forEach((f) => {
      const y = pad.t + ch * (1 - f);
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(pad.l, y);
      ctx.lineTo(pad.l + cw, y);
      ctx.stroke();
    });

    safeData.forEach((d, i) => {
      const bh = (d.val / max) * ch;
      const x = pad.l + i * bw + bw * 0.14;
      const bwi = bw * 0.72;
      const y = pad.t + ch - bh;
      const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, y, 0, pad.t + ch);
      grad.addColorStop(0, "rgba(255,77,26,.88)");
      grad.addColorStop(1, "rgba(200,38,0,.42)");
      ctx.fillStyle = grad;
      drawRoundedRect(ctx, x, y, bwi, bh, [3, 3, 0, 0]);
      ctx.fill();
      ctx.font = `400 9px ${MONO}`;
      ctx.fillStyle = TEXT;
      ctx.textAlign = "center";
      ctx.fillText(d.label, x + bwi / 2, pad.t + ch + 18);
    });
  }

  function drawHistoryLine(historyValues, costBaseValue) {
    const canvas = document.getElementById("c-history");
    if (!canvas) return;
    const sized = dpr(canvas);
    if (!sized) return;
    const { ctx, w, h } = sized;
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);
    const rawVals = historyValues.length >= 2 ? historyValues : [1, 1];
    const costBase = rawVals.map(() => (Number.isFinite(costBaseValue) && costBaseValue > 0 ? costBaseValue : rawVals[0]));
    const pad = { t: 18, r: 14, b: 30, l: 14 };
    const cw = w - pad.l - pad.r;
    const ch = h - pad.t - pad.b;
    const n = rawVals.length;
    const min = Math.min(...rawVals, ...costBase) * 0.99;
    const max = Math.max(...rawVals, ...costBase) * 1.01;
    const px = (i) => pad.l + (i / (n - 1)) * cw;
    const py = (v) => pad.t + ch - ((v - min) / (max - min || 1)) * ch;

    ctx.strokeStyle = M;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    [0, 0.33, 0.67, 1].forEach((f) => {
      const y = pad.t + ch * (1 - f);
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(pad.l, y);
      ctx.lineTo(pad.l + cw, y);
      ctx.stroke();
    });

    ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(155,93,229,.45)";
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.setLineDash([4, 4]);
    ctx.beginPath();
    costBase.forEach((v, i) => (i === 0 ? ctx.moveTo(px(i), py(v)) : ctx.lineTo(px(i), py(v))));
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.setLineDash([]);

    const areaGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, pad.t, 0, pad.t + ch);
    areaGrad.addColorStop(0, "rgba(255,77,26,.18)");
    areaGrad.addColorStop(1, "rgba(255,77,26,0)");
    ctx.fillStyle = areaGrad;
    ctx.beginPath();
    rawVals.forEach((v, i) => (i === 0 ? ctx.moveTo(px(i), py(v)) : ctx.lineTo(px(i), py(v))));
    ctx.lineTo(px(n - 1), pad.t + ch);
    ctx.lineTo(px(0), pad.t + ch);
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.strokeStyle = O;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    rawVals.forEach((v, i) => (i === 0 ? ctx.moveTo(px(i), py(v)) : ctx.lineTo(px(i), py(v))));
    ctx.stroke();

    const ex = px(n - 1);
    const ey = py(rawVals[n - 1]);
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(ex, ey, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = "#fff";
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = O;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.stroke();

    const labels = ["Start", "", "", "", "", "", "Now"];
    ctx.font = `400 9px ${MONO}`;
    ctx.fillStyle = TEXT;
    ctx.textAlign = "center";
    labels.forEach((label, i) => {
      if (!label) return;
      ctx.fillText(label, pad.l + (i / (labels.length - 1)) * cw, pad.t + ch + 18);
    });
  }

  function renderLegend(container, items) {
    if (!container) return;
    container.innerHTML = items
      .map(
        (item) =>
          `<div class="leg"><span class="leg-dot" style="background:${item.color}"></span>${escapeHtml(item.label)} ${formatPercent(item.pct, { decimals: 1 })}</div>`,
      )
      .join("");
  }

  async function apiJson(url, options = {}) {
    const response = await fetch(url, options);
    let payload = null;
    try {
      payload = await response.json();
    } catch {
      payload = null;
    }

    if (response.status === 401) {
      state.redirecting = true;
      window.location.href = "/classic";
      throw new Error("Please sign in first.");
    }

    if (!response.ok) {
      const message = payload && payload.error ? payload.error : `Request failed (${response.status}).`;
      throw new Error(message);
    }

    return payload;
  }

  async function loadSession() {
    if (state.demoMode) {
      state.sessionUser = cloneData(DEMO_SESSION_USER);
      setText("nav-user-email", "Demo workspace");
      const navPlatinumLink = document.getElementById("nav-platinum-link");
      if (navPlatinumLink) {
        navPlatinumLink.style.display = isPlatinumUser(DEMO_SESSION_USER.email) ? "" : "none";
      }
      setText("meta-account-name", DEMO_SESSION_USER.displayName);
      setClass("meta-plan-chip", "plan-chip pro");
      setText("meta-plan-chip", "Pro Demo");
      setText("pro-console-badge", "Pro Demo");
      const proConsole = document.getElementById("pro-console");
      if (proConsole) {
        proConsole.style.display = "";
      }
      applyModeChrome();
      applyPlanVisibility();
      renderHoldingsAi();
      return;
    }

    const payload = await apiJson("/api/auth/session", { cache: "no-store" });
    if (!payload.authenticated || !payload.user) {
      state.redirecting = true;
      window.location.href = "/classic";
      return;
    }
    state.sessionUser = payload.user;
    setText("nav-user-email", payload.user.email);
    const navPlatinumLink = document.getElementById("nav-platinum-link");
    if (navPlatinumLink) {
      navPlatinumLink.style.display = isPlatinumUser(payload.user.email) ? "" : "none";
    }
    setText("meta-account-name", payload.user.displayName || payload.user.email);
    const chipClass = payload.user.proEnabled ? "plan-chip pro" : "plan-chip starter";
    const chipLabel = payload.user.proEnabled ? "Pro Active" : "Starter";
    setClass("meta-plan-chip", chipClass);
    setText("meta-plan-chip", chipLabel);
    setText("pro-console-badge", chipLabel);
    const proConsole = document.getElementById("pro-console");
    if (proConsole) {
      proConsole.style.display = payload.user.proEnabled ? "" : "none";
    }
    if (!payload.user.proEnabled) {
      state.holdingsAi = null;
      state.holdingsAiError = "";
      state.holdingsAiLoading = false;
    }
    applyModeChrome();
    applyPlanVisibility();
    renderHoldingsAi();
  }

  async function loadPortfolio() {
    if (state.demoMode) {
      state.portfolio = cloneData(DEMO_PORTFOLIO_STATE);
      return;
    }
    state.portfolio = await apiJson("/api/portfolio", { cache: "no-store" });
  }

  async function loadAlerts() {
    if (state.demoMode) {
      state.alerts = cloneData(DEMO_DIP_ALERTS);
      state.availableAlertTickers = [...DEMO_AVAILABLE_TICKERS];
      renderAlerts();
      return;
    }
    if (!state.sessionUser?.proEnabled) {
      state.alerts = [];
      state.availableAlertTickers = [];
      renderAlerts();
      return;
    }
    const payload = await apiJson("/api/alerts/price-dip", { cache: "no-store" });
    state.alerts = payload.alerts || [];
    state.availableAlertTickers = payload.availableTickers || [];
    renderAlerts();
  }

  async function loadHistoricalRisk() {
    if (state.demoMode) {
      state.historicalRiskEstimate = null;
      return;
    }
    const apiWindow = RISK_API_WINDOW_MAP[state.riskWindow] || "3M";
    try {
      state.historicalRiskEstimate = await apiJson(`/api/risk/estimate?window=${apiWindow}`, { method: "POST" });
    } catch {
      state.historicalRiskEstimate = null;
    }
  }

  function renderAlerts() {
    const alertsList = document.getElementById("alerts-list");
    const activeCount = state.alerts.filter((alert) => alert.enabled).length;
    setText("alerts-active-count", `${activeCount} active`);
    if (!alertsList) return;

    if (state.alerts.length === 0) {
      alertsList.innerHTML = `
        <div class="alert-card" style="grid-column:1 / -1;justify-content:center">
          <div class="alert-info">
            <div class="alert-ticker">No Alerts</div>
            <div class="alert-detail">Add your first dip alert above.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      `;
      return;
    }

    alertsList.innerHTML = state.alerts
      .slice(0, 6)
      .map((alert) => {
        const statusClass = alert.enabled ? "on" : "off";
        const statusLabel = alert.enabled ? "Active" : "Paused";
        const lastTriggered = alert.lastTriggeredAt ? formatDateTime(alert.lastTriggeredAt) : "Never triggered";
        return `
          <div class="alert-card">
            <div class="alert-info">
              <div class="alert-ticker">${escapeHtml(alert.ticker)}</div>
              <div class="alert-detail">Alert at −${Number(alert.dropPctThreshold).toFixed(1)}% · ${escapeHtml(lastTriggered)}</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem">
              <div class="alert-badge ${statusClass}">${statusLabel}</div>
              <button class="nav-btn" data-alert-delete="${escapeHtml(alert.ticker)}">Delete</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
      })
      .join("");
  }

  function renderAiList(items, emptyLabel = "No data returned.") {
    if (!Array.isArray(items) || items.length === 0) {
      return `<p>${escapeHtml(emptyLabel)}</p>`;
    }

    return `<ul>${items.slice(0, 10).map((item) => `<li>${escapeHtml(String(item || ""))}</li>`).join("")}</ul>`;
  }

  function renderHoldingsAi() {
    const askButton = document.getElementById("pro-ai-ask-btn");
    const questionInput = document.getElementById("pro-ai-question");
    const metaEl = document.getElementById("pro-ai-meta");
    const errorEl = document.getElementById("pro-ai-error");
    const outputEl = document.getElementById("pro-ai-output");
    if (!(askButton instanceof HTMLButtonElement) || !(questionInput instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement) || !metaEl || !errorEl || !outputEl) {
      return;
    }

    const hasHoldings = Array.isArray(state.portfolio?.holdings) && state.portfolio.holdings.length > 0;
    const isPro = Boolean(state.sessionUser?.proEnabled);

    askButton.disabled = state.holdingsAiLoading || !isPro || !hasHoldings;
    askButton.textContent = state.holdingsAiLoading ? "Analyzing..." : "Ask AI";

    if (questionInput.value.trim().length === 0) {
      questionInput.value = HOLDINGS_AI_DEFAULT_QUESTION;
    }

    if (state.holdingsAiError) {
      errorEl.hidden = false;
      errorEl.textContent = state.holdingsAiError;
    } else {
      errorEl.hidden = true;
      errorEl.textContent = "";
    }

    const analysis = state.holdingsAi;
    if (!analysis) {
      metaEl.textContent = "No analysis yet";
      outputEl.innerHTML = "";
      return;
    }

    const generatedAt = analysis.generatedAt ? formatDateTime(analysis.generatedAt) : "Now";
    metaEl.textContent = `${generatedAt} via ${analysis.model || "AI model"}`;

    const breakdown = Array.isArray(analysis.holdingBreakdown) ? analysis.holdingBreakdown.slice(0, 10) : [];
    const breakdownHtml = breakdown.length === 0
      ? `<p>No holding-level breakdown returned.</p>`
      : `
        <div class="console-ai-holding-grid">
          ${breakdown.map((row) => {
            const influences = Array.isArray(row.influences) && row.influences.length > 0
              ? `<ul>${row.influences.slice(0, 6).map((item) => `<li>${escapeHtml(String(item || ""))}</li>`).join("")}</ul>`
              : "";
            const riskFlags = Array.isArray(row.riskFlags) && row.riskFlags.length > 0
              ? `<div class="console-ai-risk">Risk: ${escapeHtml(row.riskFlags.join(" | "))}</div>`
              : "";

            return `
              <div class="console-ai-holding">
                <div class="console-ai-holding-head">
                  <strong>${escapeHtml(String(row.ticker || "—"))}</strong>
                  <span>Confidence ${Number.isFinite(Number(row.confidence)) ? Math.round(Number(row.confidence)) : 0}%</span>
                </div>
                <p>${escapeHtml(String(row.summary || ""))}</p>
                ${influences}
                ${riskFlags}
              </div>
            `;
          }).join("")}
        </div>
      `;

    outputEl.innerHTML = `
      <div class="console-ai-block">
        <h4>Answer</h4>
        <p>${escapeHtml(String(analysis.answer || ""))}</p>
      </div>
      <div class="console-ai-block">
        <h4>Portfolio Drivers</h4>
        ${renderAiList(analysis.portfolioDrivers, "No portfolio drivers returned.")}
      </div>
      <div class="console-ai-block">
        <h4>Holding-Level Influences</h4>
        ${breakdownHtml}
      </div>
      <div class="console-ai-grid">
        <div class="console-ai-block">
          <h4>Risk Checks</h4>
          ${renderAiList(analysis.riskChecks, "No risk checks returned.")}
        </div>
        <div class="console-ai-block">
          <h4>Next Actions</h4>
          ${renderAiList(analysis.nextActions, "No next actions returned.")}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  async function runHoldingsAi() {
    if (state.demoMode) {
      const questionInput = document.getElementById("pro-ai-question");
      const question = questionInput instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement && questionInput.value.trim().length > 0
        ? questionInput.value.trim().slice(0, 700)
        : HOLDINGS_AI_DEFAULT_QUESTION;

      state.holdingsAiLoading = true;
      state.holdingsAiError = "";
      renderHoldingsAi();

      await new Promise((resolve) => {
        window.setTimeout(resolve, 350);
      });

      state.holdingsAi = buildDemoHoldingsAiAnalysis(question);
      state.holdingsAiLoading = false;
      renderHoldingsAi();
      renderPortfolio();
      showToast("Demo Ask AI analysis updated.");
      return;
    }

    if (!state.sessionUser?.proEnabled) {
      showToast("Ask AI is available on Pro only.", "error");
      return;
    }

    if (!Array.isArray(state.portfolio?.holdings) || state.portfolio.holdings.length === 0) {
      showToast("Import holdings first, then run Ask AI.", "error");
      return;
    }

    const questionInput = document.getElementById("pro-ai-question");
    const question = questionInput instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement && questionInput.value.trim().length > 0
      ? questionInput.value.trim().slice(0, 700)
      : HOLDINGS_AI_DEFAULT_QUESTION;

    state.holdingsAiLoading = true;
    state.holdingsAiError = "";
    renderHoldingsAi();

    try {
      const payload = await apiJson("/api/pro/holdings-ai", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ question }),
      });

      if (!payload || !payload.analysis) {
        throw new Error("AI analysis response was empty.");
      }

      state.holdingsAi = payload.analysis;
      state.holdingsAiError = "";
      showToast("Ask AI analysis updated.");
    } catch (error) {
      state.holdingsAiError = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to run Ask AI analysis.";
      showToast(state.holdingsAiError, "error");
    } finally {
      state.holdingsAiLoading = false;
      renderHoldingsAi();
      renderPortfolio();
    }
  }

  function renderPortfolio() {
    const holdings = state.portfolio.holdings || [];
    const snapshots = state.portfolio.snapshots || [];
    const metrics = computeMetrics(holdings, snapshots, state.riskWindow);
    const today = computeTodayChange(holdings, snapshots);
    const effectiveVar95Pct = metrics.var95Pct ?? state.historicalRiskEstimate?.var95Pct ?? null;
    const effectiveCvar95Pct = metrics.cvar95Pct ?? state.historicalRiskEstimate?.cvar95Pct ?? null;
    const effectiveMaxDrawdownPct = metrics.maxDrawdownPct ?? state.historicalRiskEstimate?.maxDrawdownPct ?? null;
    const effectiveVolatilityPct = metrics.volatilityAnnualPct ?? state.historicalRiskEstimate?.volatilityAnnualPct ?? null;
    const effectiveBeta = state.historicalRiskEstimate?.betaToBenchmark ?? null;
    const effectiveTrackingError = state.historicalRiskEstimate?.trackingErrorAnnualPct ?? null;
    const usingYahooVar95 = metrics.var95Pct == null && Number.isFinite(state.historicalRiskEstimate?.var95Pct);
    const usingYahooCvar95 = metrics.cvar95Pct == null && Number.isFinite(state.historicalRiskEstimate?.cvar95Pct);
    const usingYahooDrawdown = metrics.maxDrawdownPct == null && Number.isFinite(state.historicalRiskEstimate?.maxDrawdownPct);
    const usingYahooVolatility = metrics.volatilityAnnualPct == null && Number.isFinite(state.historicalRiskEstimate?.volatilityAnnualPct);
    const usingYahooBeta = Number.isFinite(state.historicalRiskEstimate?.betaToBenchmark);
    const usingYahooTrackingError = Number.isFinite(state.historicalRiskEstimate?.trackingErrorAnnualPct);
    const isPro = Boolean(state.sessionUser?.proEnabled);
    const riskScore = computeRiskScore(metrics, metrics.dailyReturns.length, state.holdingsAi, isPro);

    const latestReportDate = holdings.reduce((max, item) => (String(item.reportDate || "") > String(max) ? item.reportDate : max), "");
    const latestPriceTime = state.portfolio.lastPriceRefreshAt || state.portfolio.updatedAt || "";
    const bullionHoldings = holdings.filter((holding) => holding.source === "gold");
    const goldHoldings = bullionHoldings.filter((holding) => detectBullionMetal(holding) === "gold");
    const silverHoldings = bullionHoldings.filter((holding) => detectBullionMetal(holding) === "silver");
    const goldWeightOz = sum(goldHoldings.map((holding) => (Number.isFinite(holding.units) ? Number(holding.units) : 0)));
    const silverWeightOz = sum(silverHoldings.map((holding) => (Number.isFinite(holding.units) ? Number(holding.units) : 0)));
    const goldValue = sum(goldHoldings.map((holding) => Number(holding.value) || 0));
    const goldCost = sum(goldHoldings.map((holding) => Number(holding.costBase) || 0));
    const silverValue = sum(silverHoldings.map((holding) => Number(holding.value) || 0));
    const silverCost = sum(silverHoldings.map((holding) => Number(holding.costBase) || 0));
    const withPrice = holdings.filter((holding) => Number.isFinite(holding.price) && holding.price > 0).length;
    const withCost = holdings.filter((holding) => Number.isFinite(holding.costBase) && holding.costBase > 0).length;
    const stale = holdings.filter((holding) => !Number.isFinite(holding.price) || holding.price <= 0).length;
    const confidence = metrics.dailyReturns.length >= 63 ? "High" : metrics.dailyReturns.length >= 20 ? "Medium" : "Low";

    setText("meta-holdings-count", `${holdings.length} positions`);
    setText("meta-latest-report", latestReportDate ? formatDate(latestReportDate) : "—");
    setText("meta-prices-updated", latestPriceTime ? formatDateTime(latestPriceTime) : "—");
    setText("holdings-count-label", `${holdings.length} positions`);

    setText("mini-total-value", formatCurrency(metrics.totalValue));
    setText("mini-unrealised-pnl", formatSignedCurrency(metrics.pnl));
    setText("mini-day-change", formatSignedCurrency(today.amount));
    setText("mini-var95", effectiveVar95Pct != null ? formatPercent(effectiveVar95Pct, { negative: true, decimals: 1 }) : "—");
    setClass("mini-unrealised-pnl", `kpi-mini-val ${metrics.pnl >= 0 ? "accent" : ""}`.trim());
    setClass("mini-day-change", `kpi-mini-val ${today.amount < 0 ? "accent" : ""}`.trim());
    setText("risk-bar-value", riskScore ? `${riskScore.score} / 100` : "—");
    const fill = document.getElementById("risk-bar-fill");
    if (fill) fill.style.width = `${riskScore ? riskScore.score : 0}%`;

    setText("kpi-total-value", formatCurrency(metrics.totalValue));
    setText("kpi-total-cost", formatCurrency(metrics.totalCost));
    setText("kpi-total-pnl", formatSignedCurrency(metrics.pnl));
    setText("kpi-total-pnl-sub", `${formatPercent(metrics.pnlPct, { signed: true, decimals: 1 })} since entry`);
    setText("kpi-day-change", formatSignedCurrency(today.amount));
    setText("kpi-day-change-sub", `${formatPercent(today.pct, { signed: true, decimals: 2 })} on day`);
    setText("kpi-risk-score", riskScore ? `${riskScore.score} / 100` : "—");
    setText("kpi-risk-score-sub", riskScore ? `${riskScore.label} exposure` : "Waiting for risk data");
    setText("kpi-var95", effectiveVar95Pct != null ? formatPercent(effectiveVar95Pct, { negative: true, decimals: 1 }) : "—");

    setText("risk-score", riskScore ? `${riskScore.score} / 100` : "—");
    setText("risk-score-sub", riskScore ? riskScore.label : "Insufficient history");
    setText("risk-top3", formatPercent(metrics.top3ConcentrationPct, { decimals: 1 }));
    setText("risk-top3-sub", metrics.top3ConcentrationPct >= 40 ? "High concentration" : "Balanced concentration");
    setText("risk-hhi", Number.isFinite(metrics.hhi) ? Number(metrics.hhi).toLocaleString("en-AU", { maximumFractionDigits: 0 }) : "—");
    setText(
      "risk-hhi-sub",
      metrics.hhi >= 2500
        ? "High concentration"
        : metrics.hhi >= 1500
          ? "Moderate concentration"
          : "Diversified",
    );
    setClass(
      "risk-hhi",
      `risk-val ${metrics.hhi >= 2500 ? "danger" : metrics.hhi >= 1500 ? "purple" : ""}`.trim(),
    );
    setText("risk-rsi", Number.isFinite(metrics.rsi14) ? Number(metrics.rsi14).toFixed(1) : "—");
    setText(
      "risk-rsi-sub",
      !Number.isFinite(metrics.rsi14)
        ? "Needs more history"
        : metrics.rsi14 > 70
          ? "Overbought (>70)"
          : metrics.rsi14 < 30
            ? "Oversold (<30)"
            : "Neutral range",
    );
    setClass("risk-rsi", `risk-val ${metrics.rsi14 > 70 ? "danger" : metrics.rsi14 < 30 ? "purple" : ""}`.trim());
    setText("risk-stochastic", Number.isFinite(metrics.stochastic14) ? Number(metrics.stochastic14).toFixed(1) : "—");
    setText(
      "risk-stochastic-sub",
      !Number.isFinite(metrics.stochastic14)
        ? "Needs more history"
        : metrics.stochastic14 > 80
          ? "Overbought (>80)"
          : metrics.stochastic14 < 20
            ? "Oversold (<20)"
            : "Neutral range",
    );
    setClass(
      "risk-stochastic",
      `risk-val ${metrics.stochastic14 > 80 ? "danger" : metrics.stochastic14 < 20 ? "purple" : ""}`.trim(),
    );
    setText("risk-obv", Number.isFinite(metrics.obvValue) ? formatSignedCompact(metrics.obvValue, { decimals: 1 }) : "—");
    setText("risk-obv-sub", metrics.obvTrend || "Needs more history");
    setClass("risk-obv", `risk-val ${metrics.obvValue < 0 ? "danger" : metrics.obvValue > 0 ? "purple" : ""}`.trim());
    setText("risk-var95", effectiveVar95Pct != null ? formatPercent(effectiveVar95Pct, { negative: true, decimals: 1 }) : "—");
    setText("risk-cvar95", effectiveCvar95Pct != null ? formatPercent(effectiveCvar95Pct, { negative: true, decimals: 1 }) : "—");
    setText("risk-max-drawdown", effectiveMaxDrawdownPct != null ? formatPercent(effectiveMaxDrawdownPct, { negative: true, decimals: 1 }) : "—");
    setText("risk-volatility", effectiveVolatilityPct != null ? formatPercent(effectiveVolatilityPct, { decimals: 1 }) : "—");
    setText("risk-beta", Number.isFinite(effectiveBeta) ? Number(effectiveBeta).toFixed(2) : "—");
    setText("risk-tracking-error", Number.isFinite(effectiveTrackingError) ? formatPercent(effectiveTrackingError, { decimals: 1 }) : "—");
    setText("risk-var95-sub", usingYahooVar95 ? "Yahoo estimate fallback" : "Max expected loss");
    setText("risk-cvar95-sub", usingYahooCvar95 ? "Yahoo estimate fallback" : "CVaR beyond VaR");
    setText("risk-max-drawdown-sub", usingYahooDrawdown ? "Yahoo estimate fallback" : "Worst peak to trough");
    setText("risk-volatility-sub", usingYahooVolatility ? "Yahoo estimate fallback" : "Annualised std dev");
    setText("risk-beta-sub", usingYahooBeta ? "Yahoo estimate vs ASX 200" : "Market sensitivity");
    setText("risk-tracking-error-sub", usingYahooTrackingError ? "Yahoo estimate vs ASX 200" : "vs benchmark");

    setText("pro-expected-shortfall", effectiveCvar95Pct != null ? formatPercent(effectiveCvar95Pct, { negative: true, decimals: 1 }) : "—");
    setText("pro-beta", Number.isFinite(effectiveBeta) ? Number(effectiveBeta).toFixed(2) : "—");
    setText("pro-tracking-error", Number.isFinite(effectiveTrackingError) ? formatPercent(effectiveTrackingError, { decimals: 1 }) : "—");
    const aiAdjustment = Number(riskScore?.aiAdjustment || 0);
    setText("pro-ai-risk-adjustment", `${aiAdjustment >= 0 ? "+" : ""}${aiAdjustment} pts`);
    setClass("pro-ai-risk-adjustment", `console-val ${aiAdjustment < 0 ? "danger" : ""}`.trim());

    setText("bullion-gold-weight", `${goldWeightOz.toLocaleString("en-AU", { maximumFractionDigits: 2 })} oz`);
    setText("bullion-gold-value", formatCurrency(goldValue));
    setText("bullion-gold-pnl", formatSignedCurrency(goldValue - goldCost));
    setText("bullion-silver-weight", `${silverWeightOz.toLocaleString("en-AU", { maximumFractionDigits: 2 })} oz`);
    setText("bullion-silver-value", formatCurrency(silverValue));
    setText("bullion-silver-pnl", formatSignedCurrency(silverValue - silverCost));
    setClass("bullion-gold-pnl", `bullion-val ${(goldValue - goldCost) >= 0 ? "accent" : ""}`.trim());
    setClass("bullion-silver-pnl", `bullion-val ${(silverValue - silverCost) >= 0 ? "accent" : ""}`.trim());

    const riskWindowText = state.riskWindow;
    const points = metrics.riskPointsUsed;
    const startDate = metrics.riskStartDate ? formatDate(metrics.riskStartDate) : "—";
    const endDate = metrics.riskEndDate ? formatDate(metrics.riskEndDate) : "—";
    const riskLabel = document.getElementById("risk-window-label");
    if (riskLabel) {
      riskLabel.innerHTML = `Window <span>${escapeHtml(riskWindowText)}</span> — ${points} snapshot points from ${escapeHtml(startDate)} to ${escapeHtml(endDate)}`;
    }
    const estimateNote = document.getElementById("risk-estimate-note");
    if (estimateNote) {
      const estimate = state.historicalRiskEstimate;
      const shouldShowEstimate =
        Boolean(estimate?.note) &&
        (
          usingYahooVar95 ||
          usingYahooCvar95 ||
          usingYahooDrawdown ||
          usingYahooVolatility ||
          usingYahooBeta ||
          usingYahooTrackingError
        );
      if (shouldShowEstimate) {
        const details = [];
        if (Number.isFinite(estimate.pointsUsed) && Number.isFinite(estimate.pointsTarget)) {
          details.push(`${estimate.pointsUsed}/${estimate.pointsTarget} points`);
        }
        if (Array.isArray(estimate.usedTickers)) {
          details.push(`${estimate.usedTickers.length} tickers`);
        }
        if (Number.isFinite(estimate.benchmarkPointsUsed)) {
          details.push(`${estimate.benchmarkPointsUsed} benchmark days`);
        }
        const requestWindow = state.riskWindow;
        const yahooWindow = estimate.riskWindow || (RISK_API_WINDOW_MAP[requestWindow] || "3M");
        const windowMessage = yahooWindow !== requestWindow ? `Yahoo proxy window ${yahooWindow} used for ${requestWindow}. ` : "";
        estimateNote.hidden = false;
        estimateNote.textContent = `${windowMessage}${estimate.note}${details.length ? ` (${details.join(", ")})` : ""}`;
      } else {
        estimateNote.hidden = true;
        estimateNote.textContent = "";
      }
    }

    const qualityValues = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".quality-card .quality-val"));
    if (qualityValues.length >= 8) {
      qualityValues[0].textContent = `${holdings.length} Rows`;
      qualityValues[1].textContent = holdings.length > 0 ? formatPercent((withPrice / holdings.length) * 100, { decimals: 0 }) : "0%";
      qualityValues[2].textContent = holdings.length > 0 ? formatPercent((withCost / holdings.length) * 100, { decimals: 0 }) : "0%";
      qualityValues[3].textContent = `${snapshots.length} Points`;
      qualityValues[4].textContent = confidence;
      qualityValues[5].textContent = Number.isFinite(state.historicalRiskEstimate?.benchmarkPointsUsed)
        ? `${state.historicalRiskEstimate.benchmarkPointsUsed} Days`
        : "—";
      qualityValues[6].textContent = latestReportDate ? formatDate(latestReportDate) : "—";
      qualityValues[7].textContent = `${stale} Found`;
    }

    const perfList = document.querySelector(".perf-list");
    if (perfList) {
      const topPnl = [...holdings]
        .map((holding) => ({ ticker: holding.ticker || "—", name: holding.name || "Unnamed", pnl: (holding.value || 0) - (holding.costBase || 0) }))
        .sort((a, b) => b.pnl - a.pnl)
        .slice(0, 5);
      perfList.innerHTML = topPnl
        .map((item) => {
          const tone = item.pnl >= 0 ? "pos" : "neg";
          return `
            <div class="perf-row">
              <div><div class="perf-ticker">${escapeHtml(item.ticker)}</div><div class="perf-name">${escapeHtml(item.name)}</div></div>
              <div class="perf-val ${tone}">${formatSignedCurrency(item.pnl)}</div>
            </div>
          `;
        })
        .join("");
    }

    const stressCards = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".stress-card"));
    if (stressCards.length >= 4) {
      const scenarios = [-0.4, -0.08, -0.05, 0.145];
      stressCards.forEach((card, index) => {
        const impact = metrics.totalValue * scenarios[index];
        const projected = metrics.totalValue + impact;
        const valueNode = card.querySelector(".stress-val");
        const projNode = card.querySelector(".stress-proj");
        if (valueNode) valueNode.textContent = formatSignedCurrency(impact);
        if (projNode) projNode.textContent = `Projected: ${formatCurrency(projected)}`;
      });
    }

    renderHoldingsTable(holdings);

    const accountSlices = metrics.accountAllocation.slice(0, 4).map((item, index) => ({
      pct: item.pct,
      label: item.name,
      color: [O, P, "rgba(255,255,255,.32)", "rgba(255,255,255,.14)"][index] || "rgba(255,255,255,.14)",
    }));
    const sectorSlices = metrics.sectorAllocation.slice(0, 4).map((item, index) => ({
      pct: item.pct,
      label: item.name,
      color: [O, P, "rgba(255,255,255,.28)", "rgba(255,255,255,.13)"][index] || "rgba(255,255,255,.13)",
    }));
    const normalizedAccount = normalizeSlices(accountSlices);
    const normalizedSector = normalizeSlices(sectorSlices);
    drawDonut("c-account", normalizedAccount);
    drawDonut("c-sector", normalizedSector);

    const legends = document.querySelectorAll("#charts .chart-card .legend");
    renderLegend(legends[0], normalizedAccount);
    renderLegend(legends[1], normalizedSector);

    drawHoldingsBars(metrics.topHoldings.map((item) => ({ label: String(item.ticker || "—").slice(0, 6), val: item.value || 0 })));
    drawHistoryLine(metrics.history.map((item) => item.value), metrics.totalCost);
    renderHoldingsAi();
  }

  function normalizeSlices(slices) {
    if (slices.length === 0) return [{ pct: 100, label: "No data", color: "rgba(255,255,255,.2)" }];
    const total = sum(slices.map((slice) => slice.pct)) || 1;
    return slices.map((slice) => ({ ...slice, pct: (slice.pct / total) * 100 }));
  }

  function renderHoldingsTable(holdings) {
    const tbody = document.getElementById("holdings-tbody");
    if (!tbody) return;
    const sorted = [...holdings].sort((a, b) => (b.value || 0) - (a.value || 0));

    if (sorted.length === 0) {
      tbody.innerHTML = `
        <tr>
          <td class="ticker">—</td>
          <td colspan="8">No holdings loaded. Upload a CSV report to begin.</td>
        </tr>
      `;
      return;
    }

    tbody.innerHTML = sorted
      .slice(0, 80)
      .map((holding) => {
        const pnl = (holding.value || 0) - (holding.costBase || 0);
        const source = String(holding.source || "").toLowerCase();
        const badgeClass = SOURCE_BADGE[source] || "fund";
        const sourceLabel = SOURCE_LABEL[source] || source.toUpperCase();
        const chipTone = pnl >= 0 ? "pos" : "neg";
        return `
          <tr>
            <td class="ticker">${escapeHtml(holding.ticker || "—")}</td>
            <td>${escapeHtml(holding.name || "Unnamed")}</td>
            <td><span class="badge ${badgeClass}">${sourceLabel}</span></td>
            <td><span class="chip ${chipTone}">${escapeHtml(holding.account || "Account")}</span></td>
            <td>${Number.isFinite(holding.units) && holding.units > 0 ? Number(holding.units).toLocaleString("en-AU", { maximumFractionDigits: 4 }) : "—"}</td>
            <td class="val">${Number.isFinite(holding.price) && holding.price > 0 ? formatCurrency(holding.price, { decimals: 2 }) : "—"}</td>
            <td class="val">${formatCurrency(holding.value || 0)}</td>
            <td>${Number.isFinite(holding.costBase) ? formatCurrency(holding.costBase) : "—"}</td>
            <td class="accent">${formatSignedCurrency(pnl)}</td>
          </tr>
        `;
      })
      .join("");
  }

  async function refreshPrices(options = {}) {
    const { silent = false, skipButtonState = false } = options;
    if (state.demoMode) {
      window.location.assign("/classic");
      return;
    }

    const button = document.getElementById("refresh-prices-btn");
    const original = button ? button.textContent : "Refresh Prices";
    if (button && !skipButtonState) {
      button.textContent = "Refreshing...";
      button.disabled = true;
    }
    try {
      const payload = await apiJson("/api/prices/refresh", { method: "POST" });
      state.portfolio = payload.state;
      await loadHistoricalRisk();
      renderPortfolio();
      if (!silent) {
        const triggered = Array.isArray(payload.triggeredAlerts) ? payload.triggeredAlerts.length : 0;
        const failedEmails = Array.isArray(payload.failedAlertTickers) ? payload.failedAlertTickers.length : 0;
        if (triggered > 0 || failedEmails > 0) {
          showToast(
            `Prices refreshed (${payload.updatedTickers.length}). Alerts sent: ${triggered}${failedEmails > 0 ? `, failed: ${failedEmails}` : ""}.`,
            failedEmails > 0 ? "error" : "success",
          );
        } else {
          showToast(`Prices refreshed (${payload.updatedTickers.length} tickers).`);
        }
      }
    } catch (error) {
      if (!silent) {
        showToast(error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Price refresh failed.", "error");
      }
    } finally {
      if (button && !skipButtonState) {
        button.textContent = original;
        button.disabled = false;
      }
    }
  }

  async function clearData() {
    if (state.demoMode) {
      state.portfolio = cloneData(DEMO_PORTFOLIO_STATE);
      state.alerts = cloneData(DEMO_DIP_ALERTS);
      state.availableAlertTickers = [...DEMO_AVAILABLE_TICKERS];
      state.historicalRiskEstimate = null;
      state.holdingsAi = null;
      state.holdingsAiError = "";
      state.holdingsAiLoading = false;
      const questionInput = document.getElementById("pro-ai-question");
      if (questionInput instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement) {
        questionInput.value = HOLDINGS_AI_DEFAULT_QUESTION;
      }
      renderAlerts();
      renderPortfolio();
      showToast("Demo portfolio reset.");
      return;
    }

    const confirmed = window.confirm("Clear all imported holdings, snapshots, and dip alerts? Your sign-in email/password stays active.");
    if (!confirmed) return;
    const button = document.getElementById("clear-data-btn");
    const original = button ? button.textContent : "Clear Data";
    if (button) {
      button.textContent = "Clearing...";
      button.disabled = true;
    }
    try {
      state.portfolio = await apiJson("/api/portfolio", { method: "DELETE" });
      await loadAlerts();
      await loadHistoricalRisk();
      renderPortfolio();
      showToast("Portfolio and alert data cleared. Login kept.");
    } catch (error) {
      showToast(error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to clear data.", "error");
    } finally {
      if (button) {
        button.textContent = original;
        button.disabled = false;
      }
    }
  }

  async function signOut(event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    if (state.demoMode) {
      window.location.href = "/classic#access";
      return;
    }
    try {
      await apiJson("/api/auth/logout", { method: "POST" });
    } catch {
      // best effort
    }
    window.location.href = "/classic";
  }

  async function addAlert() {
    if (!state.demoMode && !state.sessionUser?.proEnabled) {
      showToast("Dip alerts are available on Pro only.", "error");
      return;
    }
    const tickerInput = document.getElementById("alert-ticker-input");
    const thresholdInput = document.getElementById("alert-threshold-input");
    if (!tickerInput || !thresholdInput) return;
    const ticker = String(tickerInput.value || "").trim().toUpperCase();
    const threshold = Number(thresholdInput.value || "");
    if (!ticker) {
      showToast("Enter a ticker symbol.", "error");
      return;
    }
    if (!Number.isFinite(threshold) || threshold <= 0) {
      showToast("Enter a valid threshold percent.", "error");
      return;
    }
    if (state.availableAlertTickers.length > 0 && !state.availableAlertTickers.includes(ticker)) {
      showToast("Dip alerts currently support your ASX, crypto, and bullion holdings only.", "error");
      return;
    }

    if (state.demoMode) {
      const existing = state.alerts.find((alert) => alert.ticker === ticker);
      if (!existing && state.alerts.length >= 10) {
        showToast("Demo alert limit reached. Remove one to add another.", "error");
        return;
      }
      const nowIso = new Date().toISOString();
      if (existing) {
        state.alerts = state.alerts.map((alert) => (
          alert.ticker === ticker
            ? { ...alert, dropPctThreshold: threshold, enabled: true, updatedAt: nowIso }
            : alert
        ));
      } else {
        state.alerts = [
          ...state.alerts,
          {
            id: `demo-alert-${ticker.toLowerCase()}`,
            ticker,
            dropPctThreshold: threshold,
            enabled: true,
            lastTriggeredAt: null,
            createdAt: nowIso,
            updatedAt: nowIso,
          },
        ];
      }
      tickerInput.value = "";
      thresholdInput.value = "";
      renderAlerts();
      showToast(`Demo alert saved for ${ticker}.`);
      return;
    }

    try {
      await apiJson("/api/alerts/price-dip", {
        method: "PUT",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ ticker, dropPctThreshold: threshold, enabled: true }),
      });
      tickerInput.value = "";
      thresholdInput.value = "";
      await loadAlerts();
      showToast(`Alert saved for ${ticker}.`);
    } catch (error) {
      showToast(error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to save alert.", "error");
    }
  }

  async function deleteAlert(ticker) {
    if (!state.demoMode && !state.sessionUser?.proEnabled) {
      showToast("Dip alerts are available on Pro only.", "error");
      return;
    }
    if (state.demoMode) {
      state.alerts = state.alerts.filter((alert) => alert.ticker !== ticker);
      renderAlerts();
      showToast(`Demo alert removed for ${ticker}.`);
      return;
    }

    try {
      await apiJson(`/api/alerts/price-dip?ticker=${encodeURIComponent(ticker)}`, { method: "DELETE" });
      await loadAlerts();
      showToast(`Alert removed for ${ticker}.`);
    } catch (error) {
      showToast(error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to remove alert.", "error");
    }
  }

  const TEXT_UPLOAD_EXTENSIONS = new Set(["csv", "txt", "tsv", "psv", "json"]);
  const SUPPORTED_UPLOAD_EXTENSIONS = new Set(["csv", "txt", "tsv", "psv", "json", "xlsx", "xls", "xlsm", "xlsb", "numbers", "ods"]);

  function getFileExtension(fileName) {
    const dotIndex = fileName.lastIndexOf(".");
    if (dotIndex < 0 || dotIndex === fileName.length - 1) {
      return "";
    }
    return fileName.slice(dotIndex + 1).toLowerCase();
  }

  function arrayBufferToBase64(buffer) {
    const bytes = new Uint8Array(buffer);
    const chunkSize = 0x8000;
    let binary = "";
    for (let i = 0; i < bytes.length; i += chunkSize) {
      const slice = bytes.subarray(i, i + chunkSize);
      binary += String.fromCharCode(...slice);
    }
    return btoa(binary);
  }

  async function uploadReportFile(file) {
    if (state.demoMode) {
      showToast("Create an account to upload live portfolio files.", "error", INVALID_UPLOAD_MESSAGE_TTL_MS);
      return;
    }

    if (!file || !state.uploadSource) return;
    const extension = getFileExtension(file.name);
    if (!SUPPORTED_UPLOAD_EXTENSIONS.has(extension)) {
      showToast(INVALID_UPLOAD_FORMAT_MESSAGE, "error", INVALID_UPLOAD_MESSAGE_TTL_MS);
      return;
    }

    const payload = { source: state.uploadSource };

    if (TEXT_UPLOAD_EXTENSIONS.has(extension)) {
      const text = await file.text();
      if (!text.trim()) {
        showToast("Text report file is empty.", "error");
        return;
      }
      payload.csvText = text;
    } else {
      const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
      if (!arrayBuffer || arrayBuffer.byteLength === 0) {
        showToast("Workbook file is empty.", "error");
        return;
      }
      payload.fileName = file.name;
      payload.fileBase64 = arrayBufferToBase64(arrayBuffer);
    }

    showToast("Uploading report...");
    try {
      state.portfolio = await apiJson("/api/import/csv", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify(payload),
      });
      await loadHistoricalRisk();
      renderPortfolio();
      showToast(`${state.uploadSource.toUpperCase()} report imported.`);
    } catch (error) {
      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Upload failed.";
      const isInvalidTypeMessage =
        message.toLowerCase().includes("unsupported file type") ||
        message.toLowerCase().includes("does not accept this file type");
      showToast(message, "error", isInvalidTypeMessage ? INVALID_UPLOAD_MESSAGE_TTL_MS : 2600);
    } finally {
      state.uploadSource = null;
      uploadInput.value = "";
    }
  }

  function bindEvents() {
    document.querySelectorAll(".wtab[data-window]").forEach((button) => {
      button.addEventListener("click", async () => {
        document.querySelectorAll(".wtab[data-window]").forEach((tab) => tab.classList.remove("active"));
        button.classList.add("active");
        state.riskWindow = button.dataset.window || "6M";
        await loadHistoricalRisk();
        renderPortfolio();
      });
    });

    document.getElementById("refresh-prices-btn")?.addEventListener("click", refreshPrices);
    document.getElementById("clear-data-btn")?.addEventListener("click", clearData);
    document.getElementById("sign-out-btn")?.addEventListener("click", signOut);
    document.getElementById("add-alert-btn")?.addEventListener("click", addAlert);
    document.getElementById("pro-ai-ask-btn")?.addEventListener("click", runHoldingsAi);

    document.getElementById("alerts-list")?.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
      const target = event.target;
      if (!(target instanceof HTMLElement)) return;
      const ticker = target.getAttribute("data-alert-delete");
      if (ticker) {
        deleteAlert(ticker);
      }
    });

    uploads.forEach((card) => {
      card.addEventListener("click", () => {
        if (state.demoMode) {
          showToast("Create an account to upload live portfolio files.", "error", INVALID_UPLOAD_MESSAGE_TTL_MS);
          return;
        }
        const source = card.getAttribute("data-source");
        if (!source) return;
        state.uploadSource = source;
        uploadInput.click();
      });
    });

    uploadInput?.addEventListener("change", async (event) => {
      const target = event.target;
      if (!(target instanceof HTMLInputElement)) return;
      const file = target.files && target.files[0];
      if (file) {
        await uploadReportFile(file);
      }
    });

    document.getElementById("pro-ai-question")?.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
      if (!(event instanceof KeyboardEvent)) return;
      if (event.key === "Enter" && (event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey)) {
        event.preventDefault();
        void runHoldingsAi();
      }
    });

    window.addEventListener("resize", () => {
      if (chartResizeTimer) {
        window.clearTimeout(chartResizeTimer);
      }
      chartResizeTimer = window.setTimeout(() => {
        renderPortfolio();
      }, 120);
    });
  }

  async function boot() {
    state.demoMode = isDemoMode();
    state.redirecting = false;
    const bootSafetyTimer = window.setTimeout(() => {
      if (!state.redirecting) {
        markBootReady();
      }
    }, 8000);
    bindEvents();
    applyModeChrome();
    try {
      await loadSession();
      if (!state.sessionUser) return;
      try {
        await loadPortfolio();
      } catch (error) {
        showToast(error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to load portfolio.", "error");
      }

      const optionalTasks = await Promise.allSettled([loadAlerts(), loadHistoricalRisk()]);
      for (const task of optionalTasks) {
        if (task.status === "rejected") {
          showToast(task.reason instanceof Error ? task.reason.message : "Some dashboard data could not be loaded.", "error");
          break;
        }
      }

      if (!state.demoMode) {
        await refreshPrices({ silent: true, skipButtonState: true });
      }

      if (!state.redirecting) {
        markBootReady();
      }
      renderPortfolio();
      window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        if (!state.redirecting) {
          renderPortfolio();
        }
      });
    } catch (error) {
      showToast(error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to load dashboard.", "error");
    } finally {
      window.clearTimeout(bootSafetyTimer);
      if (!state.redirecting) {
        markBootReady();
      }
    }
  }

  void boot();
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
